IS NULL OR | r.createdAt < ? OR | (r.createdAt = ? AND r.revisionId < ?) | ) | ORDER BY r.createdAt DESC, r.revisionId DESC | LIMIT ? | """.trimMargin()

VariableNaming:S3RemoteShardStateDao_Impl.kt:S3RemoteShardStateDao_Impl$val _sql: String = """ | | SELECT | COUNT(*) AS shardCount, | MIN(last_scanned_at) AS oldestScanAt, | MAX( | CASE | WHEN idle_scan_streak = 0 | AND last_object_count > 0 | AND (? - last_scanned_at) <= ? | AND (CAST(last_change_count AS REAL) / CAST(last_object_count AS REAL)) >= ? | THEN 1 | ELSE 0 | END | ) AS hasElevatedChangePressure, | MAX( | CASE | WHEN last_verification_attempt_count >= ? | AND last_verification_failure_count >= ? | AND last_verification_attempt_count > 0 | AND (? - last_scanned_at) <= ? | AND (CAST(last_verification_failure_count AS REAL) / CAST(last_verification_attempt_count AS REAL)) >= ? | THEN 1 | ELSE 0 | END | ) AS hasHighVerificationUncertainty | FROM s3_remote_shard_state | """.trimMargin()
